summary: Phase 2 complete: detect_anomalies MCP tool wired, registered, and tested. 4 commits, 9 integration tests, 309 total MCP tests passing.
completed: Task 1: Added detectAnomaliesDefinition + handleDetectAnomalies to graph.ts
Task 2: Registered tool in server.ts (import, TOOL_DEFINITIONS, TOOL_HANDLERS)
Task 3: Created 9 integration tests in graph-anomaly.test.ts
Task 4: Updated tool count from 40 to 41 in both server test files
learnings: Z-score outlier detection with only 4 data points and default threshold 2.0 may not flag outliers -- need 8+ normal-range points for reliable detection in test fixtures
lint-staged stash/restore did not cause issues this session -- clean staging of single files per task avoided the recurring pattern
